title: Phyteuma limonifolium
taxonomy: Phyteuma limonifolium is classified within the family Campanulaceae and the order Asterales. It belongs to the genus Phyteuma, which consists of small to medium-sized flowering plants. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The species is further divided into different subspecies based on its geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. Phyteuma limonifolium is often found growing in moist, rocky areas and along streams.
